name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: Wild weekend
body:
"If I didn't have Kasich, I automatically win." -Donald Trump

"If I didn't have Kasich, I
automatically win." -Donald Trump
Peter, what a wild weekend.
Trump/Cruz are now teaming up to try to bully Gov. John Kasich
into leaving the race.

Cruz launched a third TV ad in
Wisconsin, continuing to mislead voters about Gov. Kasich's
record, while completely ignoring Trump. And at a Wisconsin
rally, Trump claimed that without Kasich in the race, he'd gain
enough delegates to win the nomination.

Talk about a validator for what
you and I know to be true - these guys are terrified to face Gov.
John Kasich at a convention because they know that delegates will
select the candidate who is not only the most prepared to be
President, but can also defeat Hillary Clinton: John Kasich

Show Gov. Kasich that you have
his back with a quick $25 or more contribution right now!

>> CHIP IN $25 <<

>> CHIP IN $50 <<

>> CHIP IN $100 <<

The Wisconsin Primary is on
Tuesday and we expect to grab more delegates before heading to
New York, Pennsylvania and other Northeast states. With your
ongoing support, we'll continue to gain momentum heading into the
convention!

Thanks for all that you're doing.

John Weaver
Chief Strategist
JohnKasich.com

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Need a BIG Favor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Friend, I'm facing the biggest challenge of my campaign -- beating Donald Trump in Wisconsin -- and I need a personal favor from you. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34594150:sToep9CZN:m:1:1104269936:F58825CE701ED2108AAD2347E1C60716:r)
---
Friend,

I wouldn't be here without you.

But I'm facing the biggest challenge of my campaign -- beating Donald Trump in Wisconsin -- and I need a personal favor from you.

Friend...today before the biggest challenge yet for my campaign -- [**will you consider making a special, ground floor gift of $3?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34594150:sToep9CZN:m:1:1104269936:F58825CE701ED2108AAD2347E1C60716:r)

Here is the truth: _this campaign cannot function without you. My family and I have only made it this far because you have been with us as we've campaigned across the country._

Because of you, we are on the verge of winning the Republican nomination -- and defeating Hillary. But it could all fall apart if I don't have your continued support.

[**I hope you can make a special donaton of $3 right now.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34594150:sToep9CZN:m:1:1104269936:F58825CE701ED2108AAD2347E1C60716:r)

Friend, I know you have done so much already. And I wouldn't ask you so directly if this wasn't the most important moment yet for our campaign.

Thank you and God Bless you.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

| | PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
www.tedcruz.org
---

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: As Wisconsin gets ready to vote
body:
#
Change takes place because people struggle, sisters and brothers. **And our campaign is a struggle for justice.**
Because there is no justice when so few people have so much, and so many have so little. There is no justice when the top one-tenth of 1 percent owns almost as much wealth as the bottom 90 percent. There is no justice when millions of people are working long hours for abysmally low wages.
**As Wisconsin gets ready to votetomorrow night, I want you to think about how great this country can be.** That we can be a nation that joins others in guaranteeing health care as a right for every man, woman, and child. A nation in which working parents can get quality, affordable child care. A nation where every child - regardless of income - has a chance to succeed.
**Every election we 've had, and will have going forward, is a referendum on our shared values. Every volunteer shift, every vote, and every contribution, an unmistakable endorsement.** So before Wisconsin votes tomorrow -- one of the most important states in this primary, I have to ask:
[**Can I count on you to make a $3 contribution before Wisconsin votes tomorrow as a way of saying you believe it is time we create an economy in this country that works for everyone, and not just a wealthy few?**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/struggle-for-justice?refcode=em160404v1-sub-c "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/struggle-for-justice?refcode=em160404v1-sub-c")
Change will not come without political participation. And in a primary that has lasted almost one year now, that means we cannot afford to rest on our previous success. Each successive primary and caucus could mean the difference between victory or defeat for our political revolution.
**But one thing I know, that history has demonstrated time and time again, is that when million of people stand up and fight ... they win.** And that is what we are doing on this campaign.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/struggle-for-justice?refcode=em160404v1-sub-c "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/struggle-for-justice?refcode=em160404v1-sub-c")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Every cent spent this week by the other side is from outside special interest groups
disclaimer_text: paid for by corporate special interest money parachuted in from/through Washington, D
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a24/3476a20e/c75d38e/2745ce91/2388087759/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, As Joe rose to 17 points up in the polls, DSCC party bosses are adding up to $1.9 million to the $1.4 million other special interest groups have already committed for TV ad buys against Joe - to replace our primary opponent's depleted resources. **We are now being outspent in each of the five major media markets in PA._But our primary opponent is not spending a single cent_ - their entire TV campaign is now solely being funded by outside corporate interest groups.** | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a24/3476a20e/c75d38e/2745ce90/2388087759/VEsE/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0404FBb1&amounts=10,16,27,50,192,256")
---
Let's be clear: **all TV ads on the other side are now paid for by corporate special interest money parachuted in from/through Washington, D.C. to try and pick Pennsylvanians ' next Senator** - our opponent no longer needs to lift a finger for funding.
_Below are the weekly numbers for each market:_
* Erie/Johnstown: Joe $15K; DC $16K -**outspent by $1K**
* Harrisburg: Joe $22K; DC $38K - **outspent by $16K**
* Pittsburgh: Joe $88K, DC $105K - **outspent by $27K**
* Scranton: Joe $23K, DC $28K - **outspent by $5K**
* Philadelphia: Joe $270K, DC $462K - **outspent by $192K**

[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a24/3476a20e/c75d38e/2745ce9f/2388087759/VEsF/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0404FBb2&amounts=10,16,27,50,192,256")
---
**Please look at the map below, and _click the media market you want to invest in to help us take on the only opponent left in the campaign against us now - corporate special interest money_ - and win! Please contribute what you can to close the gap in one of the five media markets below:**
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a24/3476a20e/c75d38e/2745ce9e/2388087759/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0404FBg1&amounts=10,16,27,50,192,256")
---

[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a24/3476a20e/c75d38e/2745ce9d/2388087759/VEsD/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0404FBb3&amounts=10,16,27,50,192,256")
---
Thank you and warmly,
Joe

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a24/3476a20e/c75d38e/2745ce9c/2388087759/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[
](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a24/3476a20e/c75d38e/2745ce9b/2388087759/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=Footer")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a24/3476a20e/c75d38e/2745ce9a/2388087759/VEsO/ "http://joesestak.com/") |
---|---|---
| Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [Unsubscribe](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a24/3476a20e/c75d38e/2745ce99/2388087759/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.joesestak.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") |

name: Mike Mikus
subject: The most important thing
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3969682398739693568/-1000338977485488128?refcode=e20160404&refcode2=e20160404nd&amount=25)
---
Friend, if you've seen the movie _Any Given Sunday_ , this is where I give the locker room speech. We're in the final stretch of the primary campaign. What we do now will determine if we win or lose on April 26th.

**And the most important thing right now? Reaching the nearly half of Pennsylvania Democrats who are still undecided.** Katie's been traveling all over the state to introduce herself, and racking up a ton of endorsements along the way (everyone from the President and VP to unions and environmental groups!).

**But one thing 's missing: You. Your help has never been more critical than it is this week. Right now we're off pace to hit our goal of 500 new donors by Wednesday's pre-primary filing deadline -- and I'm worried we won't make it. **[Will you chip in $5 now to elect Katie, the strongest candidate to defeat Pat Toomey? Your donation right now is critical.](https://act.myngp.com/el/3969682398739693568/-1000338977485488128?refcode=e20160404&refcode2=e20160404nd&amount=25)****

Look, I know we ask for a lot. But I promise we wouldn't do it if we didn't need every last supporter to help out. It's the only way we'll win this primary, beat obstructionist Pat Toomey, and give Pennsylvania the senator we deserve -- a fighter for the middle class and working families.

**[So friend, will you pitch in now, before the pre-primary filing deadline on Wednesday?](https://act.myngp.com/el/3969682398739693568/-1000338977485488128?refcode=e20160404&refcode2=e20160404nd&amount=25)**

Thanks so much,

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager ** **
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3969682398739693568/-1000338977485488128?refcode=e20160404&refcode2=e20160404nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/3969682398739693568/-1072396571523416064).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Governor Scott Walker
subject: Did you see the polls?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
When I ended my presidential bid, I did so hoping it would clear the field so that a positive conservative message could rise to the top...and it has. | Governor Scott Walker
---
Friend,

When I ended my presidential bid, I did so hoping it would clear the field so that a positive conservative message could rise to the top...and it has.

**Tomorrow, I will be casting my vote for Ted Cruz.**

_**He is the best-positioned candidate to both win the Republican nomination and defeat Hillary Clinton.**_ He is a proven conservative leader with a bold vision to reignite the promise of America.

After eight years of the failed Obama-Clinton Administration, Americans are looking for real leadership and a new direction. [**Please stand with me in support of Ted Cruz with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to Cruz for President today.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34599542:WQKPG9CNF:m:1:1104269936:C0C2A9F146706B9F48E61C25AFFA0F6F:r)

As a conservative governor, I believe we need a president who understands that our founders intended for the power to be in the states and in the hands of the people -- not concentrated in Washington. Just like we did in Wisconsin, Ted Cruz is not afraid to challenge the status quo and to stand up against the big government special interests.

**That is why I have endorsed Ted Cruz for president.**

[**Your contribution**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34599542:WQKPG9CNF:m:1:1104269936:C0C2A9F146706B9F48E61C25AFFA0F6F:r) can help Ted Cruz win big in Wisconsin tomorrow and continue to rack up the delegates he will need to be our nominee and take on Hillary Clinton in the general election.

Pundits are calling Wisconsin "the new New Hampshire" because of its importance in creating momentum at a crucial point in the primary calendar.

Polls show Ted Cruz will win Wisconsin tomorrow, and I urge you to **[support his conservative campaign right now with a contribution of $10, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even $2,700](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34599542:WQKPG9CNF:m:1:1104269936:C0C2A9F146706B9F48E61C25AFFA0F6F:r)** so he can capitalize on the momentum tomorrow's big victory will give him.

Let me be very clear: **_I am casting my support for Ted Cruz, not against anyone else._ That is because I truly believe America needs Ted Cruz.**

Senator Cruz believes in the conservative principles upon which America was built, and he will be a tireless fighter for our conservative priorities like repealing Obamacare, ending Common Core, and putting a stop to illegal immigration.

Tomorrow is a big day for Wisconsin...and with your [**immediate support for the Cruz for President campaign,**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34599542:WQKPG9CNF:m:1:1104269936:C0C2A9F146706B9F48E61C25AFFA0F6F:r) it will be the turning point in the race for the Republican nomination.

Thank you,

Scott Walker

[ CONTRIBUTE ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34599543:WQKPG9CNF:m:1:1104269936:C0C2A9F146706B9F48E61C25AFFA0F6F:r)

| | PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
www.tedcruz.org
---

name: Team Murphy
subject: March was our best month yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2307/738133e4/3425cf31/7f820711/4241625187/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160331pm?refcode=pme160331pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")
---
Friends -- March has been our best month yet!

President Obama and Vice President Biden became a part of Team Murphy.
[](www.murphyforflorida.com)
---
_Four new polls in a row_ have us ahead.

And more importantly: **over 4,000 of you stepped up to help us win Marco Rubio 's seat.** We blew our FEC goal out of the water.

_Thank you for making March such a great month._ If we keep this up, we'll have everything we need to win this race and help take back the Senate for Democrats.

On to the next!

Team Murphy

name: BREAKING (via Van Hollen HQ)
subject: results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
>
> Friend,
>
> March was an incredible month for our campaign. Grassroots supporters like yourself, friend, came together to knock on doors, make thousands of calls, and chip in to ensure we had our most successful month yet.
>
> But we're not done. Because of your support we're still leading this race, but our opponent is trying to close the gap with 2.4 million dollars in SuperPAC spending.
>
> Take a look at our latest polling results: **Chris Van Hollen:** 45%
> **Donna Edwards:** 40%
> _Source Washington Post 4/1/2016_
> [**Chip in now to help us cross the finish line >>>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c9e/70cdc2ba/47d5b151/396825f/196694981/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-final-push?refcode=em4416&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in+now+to+help+us+cross+the+finish+&utm_campaign=em4416_1&source=em4416_1") We learned today that our opponent is launching a shameless attack ad in the Baltimore media market tomorrow and a new SuperPAC has bought 300 points against Chris in the DC market. We have to act now.
>
> **[Will you rush a contribution of $25 or more right now so we can respond to the latest round of attacks by our opponent and send Chris to the name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: We could lose Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
This nomination isn't locked yet | Friend --

Two quick updates:

First: We’re down in almost every poll in Wisconsin -- tomorrow’s primary is going to be a tough fight.

Second: The Sanders campaign raised over $43 million in March -- making that the third month in a row they’ve outraised us.

This nomination isn’t locked up yet, and we’ve got to keep fighting for every vote if we want to see Hillary Clinton in the White House.

**If you have Hillary’s back before Wisconsin and the next round of critical contests, chip in right now and we’ll send you a free sticker:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUxNTA1MDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNTkxMjM1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUxNTA1MDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNTkxMjM1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUxNTA1MDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNTkxMjM1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUxNTA1MDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNTkxMjM1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjUxNTA1MDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNTkxMjM1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjUxNTA1MDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNTkxMjM1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjUxNTA1MDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNTkxMjM1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUxNTA1MDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNTkxMjM1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUxNTA1MDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNTkxMjM1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjUxNTA1MDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNTkxMjM1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUxNTA1MDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNTkxMjM1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUxNTA1MDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNTkxMjM1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUxNTA1MDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNTkxMjM1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUxNTA1MDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNTkxMjM1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
